title: AP Edge: SE
technique: Black asphalt and yellow lane dashes form a crisp road cross; repeated trunk-and-canopy clusters use layered green shading.
composition: The road intersection creates four navigable quadrants, while trees sit just outside the lanes as framing landmarks.
quality: Excellent gameplay topology: roads, water/curbs, and vegetation remain distinct at a glance.
summary: Gameplay road scene: crisp lane markings create quadrants while layered trees frame routes without blocking them.
